seo.title: Coffee and Chocolate Trifle - Marinda Kook

html:
Coffee and chocolate trifle.

Ingredients:

  • 200 ml cream
  • 15ml castor sugar
  • 4 eggs
  • 45 ml castor sugar
  • 500g mascarpone cheese
  • 1 tin caramel condensed milk
  • 100ml strong coffee.
  • 125 g boudoir biscuits
  • Coffee liqueur
  • Chocolate

Method:

  • Whip the cream stiff together with 15 ml castor sugar.
  • Whisk the egg yolks and add 45 ml castor sugar gradually.
  • Whisk until light and creamy.
  • Add the mascarpone cheese bit by bit while the mixer is running.
  • Add the caramel condensed milk and strong coffee.
  • Soak 125 g boudoir biscuits in coffee liqueur.
  • Place them at the bottom of 4 glasses.
  • Spoon the soft cheese mixture over the biscuits
  • Let it set for at least 2 hours in the fridge.
  • Sprinkle with grated chocolate to serve
